name: Stir-Fried Liver
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the liver thinly and mix with cornstarch and crushed garlic.
2. Brown the liver quickly in hot oil.
3. Add finely-sliced onions and mushrooms, stir-frying until the meat is evenly browned.
4. Add chopped scallions and soy sauce.
5. Continue cooking with constant stirring for 6 to 9 minutes.
6. A tablespoon of brandy may be added to the meat just before frying for a touch of luxury.
